languages.text: "Исчерпывающе. Замечу, что лишь ваша недальновидность стала причиной моего вмешательства. Уделяй вы больше времени управлению протекторатом, а не вылазкам вовне с неясными целями, все было бы иначе".

"Succinctly put. I will note that it was only your short-sightedness that necessitated my intervention. Had you devoted more time to governing the protectorate rather than venturing abroad with obscure objectives, matters would have unfolded differently."
languages.original_text: "Исчерпывающе. Замечу, что лишь ваша недальновидность стала причиной моего вмешательства. Уделяй вы больше времени управлению протекторатом, а не вылазкам вовне с неясными целями, все было бы иначе".

traits.locale_text: "Succinctly put. I will note that it was only your shortsightedness that necessitated my intervention. Had you devoted more time to governing the protectorate rather than venturing abroad with obscure objectives, matters would have unfolded differently."

"Succinctly put. I will note that it was only your shortsightedness that necessitated my intervention. Had you devoted more time to governing the protectorate rather than venturing abroad with obscure objectives, matters would have unfolded differently."

"Succinctly put. I will note that it was only your shortsightedness that necessitated my intervention. Had you devoted more time to governing the protectorate rather than venturing abroad with obscure objectives, matters would have unfolded differently."

"Succinctly put. I will note that it was only your short-sightedness that necessitated my intervention. Had you devoted more time to governing the protectorate rather than venturing abroad with obscure objectives, matters would have unfolded differently."

languages.text: «En resumidas cuentas. Quiero dejar constancia de que fue su falta de visión de futuro lo que hizo necesaria mi intervención. De haber dedicado más tiempo al gobierno del protectorado en vez de recorrer el sector con un cometido dudoso, la situación no habría tomado este cariz».
languages.original_text: "Succinctly put. I will note that it was only your short-sightedness that necessitated my intervention. Had you devoted more time to governing the protectorate rather than venturing abroad with obscure objectives, matters would have unfolded differently."

traits.locale_text: «En resumidas cuentas. Quiero dejar constancia de que fue su falta de visión de futuro lo que hizo necesaria mi intervención. De haber dedicado más tiempo al gobierno del protectorado en vez de recorrer el sector con un cometido dudoso, la situación no habría tomado este cariz».

languages.text: “说得倒很简明。不过我要提醒你，正是因为你的短视，才逼得我不得不插手。你若肯多花些时间治理属地，而不是为了那些不着边际的目标四处奔波，事情就不会发展到这个地步。”
languages.original_text: "Succinctly put. I will note that it was only your short-sightedness that necessitated my intervention. Had you devoted more time to governing the protectorate rather than venturing abroad with obscure objectives, matters would have unfolded differently."

traits.locale_text: “说得倒很简明。不过我要提醒你，正是因为你的短视，才逼得我不得不插手。你若肯多花些时间治理属地，而不是为了那些不着边际的目标四处奔波，事情就不会发展到这个地步。”

languages.text: « Voilà qui est bien résumé. J'ajoute cependant que seule votre imprévoyance a rendu mon intervention nécessaire. Si vous aviez consacré plus de temps à la gouvernance du protectorat au lieu de vagabonder sous d'obscurs prétextes, les choses auraient évolué différemment. »
languages.original_text: "Succinctly put. I will note that it was only your short-sightedness that necessitated my intervention. Had you devoted more time to governing the protectorate rather than venturing abroad with obscure objectives, matters would have unfolded differently."

traits.locale_text: « Voilà qui est bien résumé. J'ajoute cependant que seule votre imprévoyance a rendu mon intervention nécessaire. Si vous aviez consacré plus de temps à la gouvernance du protectorat au lieu de vagabonder sous d'obscurs prétextes, les choses auraient évolué différemment. »

languages.text: "Kısa ve net. Belirtmeliyim ki müdahalemi gerektiren tek şey öngörüsüzlüğündü. Belirsiz hedeflerle dışarılarda maceraya atılmak yerine protektorayı yönetmeye daha fazla zaman ayırsaydın işler farklı gelişirdi."
languages.original_text: "Succinctly put. I will note that it was only your short-sightedness that necessitated my intervention. Had you devoted more time to governing the protectorate rather than venturing abroad with obscure objectives, matters would have unfolded differently."

traits.locale_text: "Kısa ve net. Belirtmeliyim ki müdahalemi gerektiren tek şey öngörüsüzlüğündü. Belirsiz hedeflerle dışarılarda maceraya atılmak yerine protektorayı yönetmeye daha fazla zaman ayırsaydın işler farklı gelişirdi."

languages.text: 「要するに、あなたの短絡的な考えが私の介入を必要としただけのことです。あなたが保護国を統治するのに時間を割いて、海外に出る目的が曖昧なままでは、事態は違っていたでしょう。」
languages.original_text: "Succinctly put. I will note that it was only your short-sightedness that necessitated my intervention. Had you devoted more time to governing the protectorate rather than venturing abroad with obscure objectives, matters would have unfolded differently."

traits.locale_text: 「要するに、あなたの短絡的な考えが私の介入を必要としただけのことです。あなたが保護国を統治するのに時間を割いて、海外に出る目的が曖昧なままでは、事態は違っていたでしょう。」

languages.text: "Kurz gesagt. Ich halte fest, dass es allein Eure Kurzsichtigkeit war, die mein Eingreifen erforderlich machte. Hättet Ihr mehr Zeit in die Regierung des Protektorats investiert, anstatt mit obskuren Zielen durch das All zu reisen, hätten sich die Dinge anders entwickelt."
languages.original_text: "Succinctly put. I will note that it was only your shortsightedness that necessitated my intervention. Had you devoted more time to governing the protectorate rather than venturing abroad with obscure objectives, matters would have unfolded differently."

traits.locale_text: "Kurz gesagt. Ich halte fest, dass es allein Eure Kurzsichtigkeit war, die mein Eingreifen erforderlich machte. Hättet Ihr mehr Zeit in die Regierung des Protektorats investiert, anstatt mit obskuren Zielen durch das All zu reisen, hätten sich die Dinge anders entwickelt."
